title: Glimmering Tales
description: A magic mod revolving around nature and spells
body:
Discord: https://discord.gg/BCHNhsDMXz

Dependency: L2Library, L2Complements, L2Backpack, Patchouli, Curios

This mod adds a magic system where player discovers spells related to natural blocks and elements, craft them into natural spell runes, and then research and find out more advanced spells based on the natural spells.

This mod has a Patchouli book as guide and tutorial. Player can collect natural resources and craft crystals and wands, cast spells, perform rituals to get accessories and strengthen player. 

There are 6 natural elements, 23 natural spells, 13 advance spells, 7 wands with different elemental affinity, and 23 accessories that aids with spell casting.
